name: Chengdu Tianjian Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Chengdu Tianjian Technology Co., Ltd. researches in, develops, manufactures, and sells solid-state microwave front-end products. It offers solid-state transmitters for use in the defense military applications; phased array antennas for use in commercial satellites; radar systems, and other microwave components, such as microwave altimeter transmitter for sea surface height measurement and ocean observation through three-dimensional imaging. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in Chengdu, China.
